title: PPL (PPL) Loses 11.4% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
text: PPL (PPL) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: PPL (PPL) Forms 'Hammer Chart Pattern': Time for Bottom Fishing?
text: PPL (PPL) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.

title: Why PPL Stock Is a Good Choice for Your Portfolio Right Now
text: PPL is a lucrative stock to invest, given the positive estimates movement, efficient debt management and significant capital expenditure to strengthen infrastructure.

title: PPL: A Steady Utility With Upside Earnings Growth, But A Pricey Stock
text: The Utilities sector has returned 2% in 2022, beating the S&P 500's 22% total return decline. PPL, while underperforming the sector, has been a steady name amid market volatility.
